case_title: YI XIONG ZUO VS. JOHNNY GUAN

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ZUO, YI XIONG
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ZUO, YI XIONG AS TO DEFENDANT GUAN, JOHNNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK:P. FIOL.. NOT REPORTED. (D-506).
